channel.title: Writing on Alexander Gaura
channel.description: Recent content in Writing on Alexander Gaura

item.title: Audio Spectrum
item.description: Audio Graph ▶️ .line { fill: none; stroke: steelblue; stroke-width: 2px; } .axis line{ stroke: #808080; } .axis path{ stroke: #808080; } .axis text{ fill: #808080; } var vertexShaderSource = `#version 300 es // an attribute is an input (in) to a vertex shader. // It will receive data from a buffer in vec2 a_position; in vec2 a_texCoord;// Used to pass in the resolution of the canvas uniform vec2 u_resolution;// Used to pass the texture coordinates to the fragment shader out vec2 v_texCoord;// all shaders have a main function void main() {// convert the position from pixels to 0.

item.title: Experimental
item.description: Experimental stuff @font-face { font-family: 'Znamenny'; src: url('../fonts/MezenetsUnicode.otf') format("opentype"); } --- Sjødd dskuss wi blu iz natrly dark! 1 It’s quite common to see an image or to want to have an image in grayscale. What is it that we are doing when we have a grayscale image? We are deleting two dimensions—hue and saturation—from the color space representing our image.
